name: Blue Sapphire Golf & Resort
notes: 36-hole resort confirmed in Kanchanaburi province (Bo Phloi district) — NOT Pattaya. Address: 85 Moo 1 (or 85/1 Moo 1), Tambol Chong Dan, Bor Ploy (Bo Phloi) District, Kanchanaburi 71160. Layout: Canyon Course (Course A = Blue Sapphire + Course B = Yellow Sapphire) and Ocean Course (Course C = Pink Sapphire + Course D new). Total 36 holes. Course built on former open-cast sapphire mine — synthetic blue lakes are flooded mining pits. Designers: Steven Youdan & Art-anan Yomchinda. Year: 2003 opening with additional 9 holes added 2008 (where2golf); 1golf.eu lists 'Founded 2002'. Green fees: 1golf.eu lists weekday THB 1,000, weekend THB 1,500. GOVIGO lists 1,700 THB (18 holes) weekday and 1,900 THB weekend — may reflect bundled caddie+cart package. Caddie and cart described as compulsory by multiple sources, included in some packages. Cart fee THB 700 per Golfasian. GOVIGO states driving range 'not available'. Club rental THB 1,200 per Golfasian. Phone: +66 34 581 227-30 (range). GPS coordinates (14.357842, 99.497230) from where2golf — consistent with Bo Phloi area, Kanchanaburi. Distance: ~42 km north of Kanchanaburi town, ~30 min from Kanchanaburi, ~3 hours from Bangkok. Bangkok distance calculated as ~130 km to Kanchanaburi + 42 km = ~172 km; drive time 3 hours per golfsavers. Male caddies available (unusual for Thailand). On-site houseboat accommodation. Sources: golfasian.com, 1golf.eu, golfsavers.com, where2golf.com, govigolf.com, asiangolftoursbyigst.com
